name: IdsEdwSubgrpLvlAgntIExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT A.SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_SK, A.AGNT_ID, A.CLS_PLN_ID, A.GRP_ID, A.SUBGRP_ID, A.SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_CD_SK, A.EFF_DT_SK, A.TERM_DT_SK, A.AGNT_SK, A.CLS_PLN_SK, A.GRP_SK, A.SUBGRP_SK, COALESCE(cm.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, lkp2.TRGT_CD AS SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_CD, lkp2.TRGT_CD_NM AS SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_NM, lkp2.CD_MPPNG_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT A LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG cm ON A.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = cm.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG lkp2 ON A.SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_CD_SK = lkp2.CD_MPPNG_SK) SELECT SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_SK, CASE WHEN SRC_SYS_CD IS NULL OR SRC_SYS_CD = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, AGNT_ID, CLS_PLN_ID, GRP_ID, SUBGRP_ID, CASE WHEN CD_MPPNG_SK IS NULL THEN 'UNK' ELSE dbo.trim_default(SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_CD) END AS SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_CD, EFF_DT_SK AS SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_EFF_DT_SK, TERM_DT_SK AS SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_TERM_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, AGNT_SK, CLS_PLN_SK, GRP_SK, SUBGRP_SK, CASE WHEN CD_MPPNG_SK IS NULL THEN 'UNK' ELSE dbo.trim_default(SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_NM) END AS SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_CD_SK FROM cte_main
